title: Report errors on bad transports specification when pushing images
body:
We ignore valid errors when pushing images. This patch will check
if the user gave us a valid transport and report the error.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: ACK as far as this one instance goes. There are quite a few other instances of the “ alltransports.ParseImageName or guess” pattern which might benefit similarly, but that does not really block improving this one.

:pushpin: Commit 887d686 has been approved by `@mtrmac`
